summary: Episode 8: The recovering traveler sat alone and downcast outside the house of healing. Tariq stopped, sat with him, shared a loaf from Noor's bakery and gave warm company until the stranger brightened. Salim pointed out that Tariq had just given charity without spending a single coin — a kind word, a shared moment, simple warmth are generosity anyone can offer every day. The two have become friends. Noor still doesn't know who leaves the gifts at her door.
open_threads: Noor still doesn't know who leaves the anonymous gifts at her door
Tariq and the recovering traveler have become friends; the traveler may soon share news from distant lands
Tariq is learning calligraphy and steadily copying pages for the reading circle
Noor's courtyard reading circle keeps growing and needs more copied pages
